name: Agent status
description: Factual, numbers-first status report from an automated agent, with pre-rendered report sections and a dashboard link. Carries the mandatory automated-sender disclosure.
subject: {{agent_name}}: {{run_summary}}

variables.name: company_name
variables.description: Sender company or product name; rendered as the header wordmark and in the footer.

variables.name: support_email
variables.description: Support contact email address shown in the footer.

variables.name: company_address
variables.description: Physical mailing address for the footer (CAN-SPAM).

variables.name: preheader
variables.description: Hidden inbox preview text shown next to the subject line.

variables.name: agent_name
variables.description: Name of the agent sending the report.

variables.name: run_summary
variables.description: One-line, numbers-first summary of the run; doubles as the heading.

variables.name: sections_html
variables.description: Raw pre-rendered report sections: block-level HTML (paragraphs or simple tables) with inline styles, inserted verbatim between the summary and the dashboard button. Optionally add class="text-main" / class="text-sub" to cells for dark-mode support.
variables.example:
Processed: 128 invoices, 0 errors, 3 retries

Queue: 2 items deferred to the next run

variables.name: sections_text
variables.description: Plain-text report sections for the text part, hard-wrapped to 70 characters.
variables.example:
Processed: 128 invoices, 0 errors, 3 retries
Queue: 2 items deferred to the next run

variables.name: dashboard_url
variables.description: URL of the agent's dashboard or run detail page.
